settings.heading: Furniture That Gets Out Of Your Way
settings.text: We started EzHome because moving shouldn't mean choosing between a van rental and sleeping on the floor. Our compression-packed sofas and beds ship in a box, assemble in under 10 minutes with zero tools, and look like you hired an interior designer.

settings.heading: Radical Simplicity
settings.text: Every product must pass the 10-minute, zero-tool test. If it's complicated, it doesn't ship.

settings.heading: Honest Materials
settings.text: CertiPUR-US® foam, FSC-certified frames, OEKO-TEX® fabrics. We list every material, every source.

settings.heading: Accessible Design
settings.text: Great furniture shouldn't require a trust fund. We cut the middlemen so you get quality at a fair price.

settings.heading: Join the EzHome Family
settings.text: Early access to new drops, design tips, and exclusive offers.
